jasper.name: Jasper AI
jasper.description: AI writing assistant built for marketers and content teams. Generate blog posts, ads, and emails in seconds.

notion.name: Notion AI
notion.description: All-in-one workspace with built-in AI. Write, plan, and organize everything in one place.

make.name: Make (formerly Integromat)
make.description: Visual no-code automation platform to connect apps and automate workflows without writing code.

elevenlabs.name: ElevenLabs
elevenlabs.description: State-of-the-art AI voice generation. Clone voices and create realistic speech from text.

writesonic.name: Writesonic
writesonic.description: AI writer for blogs, ads, landing pages, and product descriptions. SEO-optimized output.

cursor.name: Cursor
cursor.description: The AI-first code editor. Write, edit, and chat about your code with GPT-4 built right in.

perplexity.name: Perplexity AI
perplexity.description: AI-powered search engine that gives you direct answers with cited sources. Replace Google for research.

chatgpt.name: ChatGPT Plus
chatgpt.description: OpenAI's flagship AI assistant. Access GPT-4, DALL-E image generation, and Advanced Data Analysis.

claude.name: Claude Pro
claude.description: Anthropic's Claude — the AI assistant that excels at analysis, writing, and complex reasoning tasks.
